perFrameCode: fg = BPM/60/2; Q=5; omega = 6.283*min(0.5,fg/fps); tcos = cos (omega); alpha = sin(omega)/(2*Q);
b0=(1-tcos)/2; b1=1-tcos; b2=(1-tcos)/2; a0=1+alpha; a1=-2*tcos; a2=1-alpha;
Xa = r1_; LOa= b0a0*Xa + b1a0*in1a + b2a0*in2a - a1a0*ou1a - a2a0*ou2a;
Xb = r2_; LOb= b0a0*Xb + b1a0*in1b + b2a0*in2b - a1a0*ou1b - a2a0*ou2b;
